hooks.command: git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null || (echo '' && echo 'Suggested commit message:' && echo '' && git diff --stat HEAD | head -20 && echo '' && git diff --cached --stat | head -20)
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q 'packages/score'; then npm run test -w packages/score --silent 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; }
